en.ahmedali: Man will fly from his brother,
en.ahmedraza: On that day man will run away from his brother.
en.arberry: upon the day when a man shall flee from his brother,
en.daryabadi: On the Day whereon a man shall flee from his brother,
en.hilali: That Day shall a man flee from his brother,
en.itani: The Day when a person will flee from his brother.
en.maududi: on the Day when each man shall flee from his brother,
en.mubarakpuri: That Day shall a man flee from his brother.
en.pickthall: On the day when a man fleeth from his brother
en.qarai: the day when a man will evade his brother,
en.qaribullah: on that Day each person will flee from his brother,
en.sahih: On the Day a man will flee from his brother
en.sarwar: it will be such a day when a person will run away from his brother,
en.shakir: The day on which a man shall fly from his brother,
en.wahiduddin: on that Day a man shall flee from his own brother,
en.yusufali: That Day shall a man flee from his own brother,
fa.ansarian: روزی که آدمی فرار می کند، از برادرش….
fa.ayati: روزى كه آدمى از برادرش مى‌گريزد،
fa.bahrampour: روزى كه آدمى از برادرش بگريزد
fa.ghomshei: آن روز که (از وحشت و هولناکی) هر کس از برادرش می‌گریزد.
fa.khorramdel: در آن روز که انسان فرار می‌کند از برادر خود. [[«یَفِرُّ»: می‌گریزد. علّت گریز این است که هرکسی برای نجات خود می‌کوشد، و از آنان که گمان می‌برد، چه بسا از او درخواست کمک کنند، فرار می‌کند.]]
fa.khorramshahi: روزی که انسان از برادرش بگریزد
fa.makarem: در آن روز که انسان از برادر خود می‌گریزد،
fa.moezzi: روزی که گریزد مرد از برادرش‌
fa.mojtabavi: روزى كه آدمى از برادر خود مى‌گريزد
